channel.title: CapeGooseberry on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in CapeGooseberry on Nature Works

item.title: Polytunnel
item.description:
Spent the day clearing up the polytunnel, there’s a few perennial veg in there and a lot of material for the compost bin

We grow Cape Gooseberry (the most excellent jam), Yacon (salads?) and Chilean Guava (sweeties! http://localhost:1313/blog/230219-polytunnel/

item.title: The Groundcherry Experiment
item.description:
I nearly composted the whole Groundcherry bed and I’m very glad I didn’t.

This is the first year we grew Groundcherries AKA Cape Gooseberries AKA Physalis peruviana. http://localhost:1313/blog/groundcherry-experiment/
